project_type: Flutter mobile app - Fantasy Cricket Platform (complete rebuild from React/Supabase)
build_system: Flutter with pubspec.yaml - NO Flutter SDK available in sandbox, generate source files only
build_command: N/A - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network, no Flutter SDK installed
test_command: N/A - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network, no Flutter SDK installed
verification_instructions: Verify Dart syntax correctness via static analysis of generated files. Cannot run flutter analyze or flutter test.
setup_instructions: Generate all Flutter/Dart source files. User will run locally with Flutter SDK.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - NO external internet, NO Flutter SDK, NO pub get possible. Generate complete source files only. Push to main branch via github Power.
contribution_requirements: Push directly to main branch. Replace existing React codebase entirely.
key_patterns: Clean Architecture with Riverpod, GoRouter navigation, Dio networking, Hive local storage, Freezed for models. Backend uses Supabase (PostgreSQL) with real-time subscriptions and Firebase Auth.
relevant_files: sql/part1-drop-and-create-tables.sql - 18 tables: users, admins, tournaments, teams, players, matches, match_players, contests, fantasy_teams, fantasy_team_players, feed_posts, groups, group_members, wallets, transactions, notifications, leaderboard, scoreboard, commentary, payment_methods
src/services/supabaseService.js - All CRUD operations for Supabase
src/services/realtimeService.js - Real-time subscriptions via Supabase channels
.env.example - Supabase URL, anon key, Firebase config
directory_structure: Target Flutter structure: lib/core/ (theme, constants, network, storage, utils), lib/features/ (auth, home, matches, contests, fantasy, wallet, groups, profile, notifications, admin), lib/shared/ (widgets, components)

database_schema.users: id, uid, email, username, phone_number, avatar_url, role, balance, total_amount_added, total_amount_won
database_schema.tournaments: id, name, logo, description, status, start_date, end_date
database_schema.teams: id, name, code, logo, flag, tournament_id
database_schema.players: id, name, role(Batsman/Bowler/All-rounder/WK), team_id, image, points, credits, is_playing
database_schema.matches: id, tournament_id, team_a_id, team_b_id, team_a_name, team_b_name, team_a_code, team_b_code, team_a_flag, team_b_flag, date_time, venue, status(upcoming/live/completed), result, winner_team_id, scores, live boolean
database_schema.match_players: id, match_id, player_id, team_id, is_playing, points
database_schema.contests: id, match_id, name, entry_fee, prize_pool, max_teams, joined_teams, contest_type(paid/free), status(open/closed/completed)
database_schema.fantasy_teams: id, user_id, match_id, contest_id, team_name, captain_id, vice_captain_id, total_points, rank
database_schema.fantasy_team_players: id, fantasy_team_id, player_id, is_captain, is_vice_captain, points
database_schema.feed_posts: id, user_id, author_name, content, image_url, likes, comments_count
database_schema.groups: id, name, description, avatar_url, created_by, member_count
database_schema.transactions: id, user_id, type(deposit/withdrawal/contest_join/winning), amount, status, description, payment_method
database_schema.notifications: id, user_id, title, message, type, is_read, data(jsonb)
database_schema.leaderboard: id, contest_id, user_id, fantasy_team_id, points, rank, prize_won
database_schema.scoreboard: id, match_id, player_id, runs, wickets, catches, stumpings, run_outs, fours, sixes, balls_faced, overs_bowled, economy, strike_rate, points
database_schema.commentary: id, match_id, over_number, ball_number, runs, event_type, description, batsman, bowler

auth_system: Firebase Auth (email/password, Google, GitHub) + Supabase for data storage
